description: Frozen eval-only benchmark for evidence-grounded transfer and transfer withholding. It does not contain Pattern Mining outputs or runtime decisions.

source_experiences.observation: Observed source case A supporting: Small batches with observable checkpoints reduce rollback cost when requirements are uncertain.
Independent source case B tests the same principle: Small batches with observable checkpoints reduce rollback cost when requirements are uncertain.
Copying the exact old deployment commands instead of transferring the risk-control principle.

candidate_pattern.proposition: Small batches with observable checkpoints reduce rollback cost when requirements are uncertain.
exclusion_conditions: Copying the exact old deployment commands instead of transferring the risk-control principle.

scenarios.target_problem: A team is planning another uncertain service migration.

expected_transfer.reason: The target preserves the causal structure within the declared scope.
expected_transfer.expected_strategy: Use staged releases with checkpoints and rollback criteria.
forbidden_overgeneralizations: Copying the exact old deployment commands instead of transferring the risk-control principle.

dangerous_transfer.possible_error: Copying the exact old deployment commands instead of transferring the risk-control principle.

expected_transfer.expected_strategy: Classify by impact and urgency before assigning responders.
forbidden_overgeneralizations: Treating every complaint as an outage because outages were prominent in the source cases.

dangerous_transfer.possible_error: Treating every complaint as an outage because outages were prominent in the source cases.
